source: bytenew testc vxe-table 复选框漏报(backlog A,2026-06-04)

entries.note: 外层 vxe-cell--checkbox 经 controlRoleFromClass 召回;内层字体图标 span 不进池:probe 整体为空(无 text/aria/svg-img,终末 token unchecked 非控件词,gate 亦无 iconFontName)
leaf control-class x-cell--radio 终末 token radio
component-2:button tag 召回 + iconFontName(vxe-icon-)补名
终末 token wrapper 非控件,不召回(噪声收敛)
round-12 守护:装饰字体图标 gate 不召回(iconFontName 不进门)
